raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find modified in last 60 days and tar to gzip. Use find -mtime -60. tar -czf. Use -C to change dir. Command: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). But better: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). Provide single command.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need find modified in last 60 days and tar to gzip. Use find -mtime -60. tar -czf. Use -C to change dir. Command: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). But better: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). Provide single command.
